title: Maru's Amplified Fabrics
description: Almost pure vanilla experience with numerous performance and quality-of-life tweaks
body:
**Maru's Amplified Fabrics(MAF)**
-
is created with the best optimization mods. It aims to deliver the best performance without affecting gameplay.

**Performance**
-
This modpack uses each and every performance mod to crank out max fps and speed up loading time. Based on Sodium/Iris. For Nvidia GPU users there is a separate version that improves fps without shaders even further.

**Features**
-
- Minimap
- World map
- Customisable F3 menu\
You can also find lots of optifine/forge features here, including:
- Ingame Zoom
- Mod Settings
- Dynamic Lights
- Increased Render Distance\
And many more.
